untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option-specific indicators (implied volatility, theta decay, time-to-expiration, term-structure analysis, volatility mean-reversion) and option spread mechanics (calendar spreads, theta comparison between strikes) not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators are equity price action only; options Greeks and volatility surface mechanics cannot be modeled.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally an options trading rule from Natenberg's work on time spreads. It requires: (1) IV forecasting with confidence thresholds, (2) theta decay comparison between options of different expirations, (3) IV change tolerances, and (4) days-to-expiration monitoring. None of these can be accurately translated using only equity price and volume indicators. The attempted mapping to hvol_20 and bb_bandwidth is a crude proxy that misses the core signal logic.
